title: NFR Catalog
description: Non-functional requirements with measurable targets. Tier 3 doc-only — resume-feature SKIPS (sre-observability MAY peek for SLO alignment, optional). Producer: from-doc (target setting) + from-code (current measurement when monitoring data accessible). Consumed by tdoc-tkkt-writer §9 (≥7 NFR items mandate) + tdoc-tkcs-writer §3.2, §3.5. Hard-stop in from-doc Phase 8 if items < 7 OR any item missing target. Justified by: TKCS §3.2 (yêu cầu phi chức năng), §3.5 (ATTT non-functional aspects), TKKT §9 (NFR section).

items.description: Min 7 NFR items per tdoc-tkkt-writer requirement. Each item MUST have requirement + target — generic 'đảm bảo hiệu năng' rejected by writer Step 4.

requirement.description: Vietnamese; what the system MUST do (≥30 chars). Example: 'Hệ thống phải đáp ứng truy cập đồng thời của 1000 người dùng'.

target.description: Measurable target. Example: 'API p95 ≤500ms cho 1000 concurrent users', '99.5% uptime', 'Hỗ trợ Chrome/Firefox/Edge phiên bản 2 năm gần nhất'.

measurement_method.description: How to measure. Example: 'Apache JMeter load test', 'Nagios uptime monitor', 'WAVE accessibility tool'.

current_value.description: Current measured value (when monitoring exists). Source for gap analysis.

applicable_components.description: architecture.components[].name where this NFR applies. Empty = applies to whole system.

category_distribution.description: Pre-computed counts per category for TKKT §9 narrative balance.
